falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp breakout above key support would contradict the bottom pattern and indicate a blowoff top rather than a consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume on the NYSE exceeds 200% of the 60-day average daily volume within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would signal speculative frenzy, invalidating the 'hold' signal by confirming a blowoff top scenario.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX index drops below 12 for 3 consecutive days within the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A VIX below 12 indicates extreme complacency, directly contradicting the blowoff score's implication of imminent volatility.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
